data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "CLAUDE.local.md is git-ignored so no commit can reference this ticket and the completion-verifier cannot read it; the strip is done and its evidence (removed-rule->new-home map, AC1 rg 'worktree|plan review|Track all work'==0, AC3 modernization decision, pre-strip backup) is recorded in the ticket comment. Non-codebase-verifiable operator-local edit -> force-close per the ADR 0043 soft path; leaves the epic certifiable:false as designed (epic ACs require closure+landing, not child signatures).". Session: aa9cb5ff-3fdb-44d3-8af8-c125c27f20ad.
